{
  "analysis": "The JIT file has brace issues from shell escaping. Let me write the entire file using Python for reliability.",

  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 /dev/stdin << 'PYSCRIPT'
js = []
js.append("'use strict';")
js.append("const fs=require('fs'),ELF=fs.readFileSync('/app/doomgeneric_mips');")
js.append("function r32e(o){return(ELF[o]|(ELF[o+1]<<8)|(ELF[o+2]<<16)|(ELF[o+3]<<24))>>>0}")
js.append("function r16e(o){return ELF[o]|(ELF[o+1]<<8)}")
js.append("const _e=r32e(0x18),_po=r32e(0x1c),_pn=r16e(0x2c),_pe=r16e(0x2a);")
js.append("const M=[];")
js.append("function pg(a){const i=a>>>16;let p=M[i];if(!p){p=new Uint8Array(65536);M[i]=p}return p}")
js.append("function r8(a){const p=M[a>>>16];return p?p[a&65535]:0}")
js.append("function w8(a,v){pg(a)[a&65535]=v}")
js.append("function r32(a){const o=a&65535,p=M[a>>>16];if(!p)return 0;return o<65533?(p[o]|(p[o+1]<<8)|(p[o+2]<<16)|(p[o+3]<<24))>>>0:(r8(a)|(r8(a+1)<<8)|(r8(a+2)<<16)|(r8(a+3)<<24))>>>0}")
js.append("function w32(a,v){const o=a&65535,p=pg(a);if(o<65533){p[o]=v;p[o+1]=v>>>8;p[o+2]=v>>>16;p[o+3]=v>>>24;return}w8(a,v);w8(a+1,v>>>8);w8(a+2,v>>>16);w8(a+3,v>>>24)}")
js.append("function r16(a){return r8(a)|(r8(a+1)<<8)}")
js.append("function w16(a,v){w8(a,v);w8(a+1,v>>>8)}")
js.append("for(let i=0;i<_pn;i++){const o=_po+i*_pe;if(r32e(o)===1){const va=r32e(o+8),fsz=r32e(o+16),off=r32e(o+4);for(let j=0;j<fsz;j++)w8(va+j,ELF[off+j])}}")
js.append("const FD=new Map;let NFD=3;FD.set(0,{t:'s'});FD.set(1,{t:'s'});FD.set(2,{t:'s'});")
js.append("let HP=0x404b2000,EX=null;")
js.append("function ms(a){a>>>=0;const b=[];for(let c;(c=r8(a))!==0;a++){b.push(c);if(b.length>4096)break}return String.fromCharCode(...b)}")
js.append("function xf(f){const ac=f&7;let s=ac===0?'r':ac===1?'w':'r+';if(f&64&&s==='r')s='r+';if(f&512)s=s.indexOf('+')>=0?'w+':'w';if(f&1024)s=s.indexOf('+')>=0?'a+':'a';return s}")
js.append("try{fs.mkdirSync('/tmp',{recursive:true})}catch(e){}")

# Syscall handler
js.append("function doSys(cpc){")
js.append("  const n=R[2],a0=R[4],a1=R[5],a2=R[6];")
js.append("  switch(n){")
js.append("    case 0:{const e=FD.get(a0);if(!e||e.t==='s'){R[2]=e?0:(-1>>>0);return}const sz=Math.min(a2,0x100000),t=Buffer.alloc(sz);const nn=fs.readSync(e.h,t,0,sz,e.p);for(let i=0;i<nn;i++)w8((a1+i)>>>0,t[i]);e.p+=nn;R[2]=nn;return}")
js.append("    case 1:{const e=FD.get(a0);if(!e){R[2]=-1>>>0;return}const sz=Math.min(a2,0x100000),t=Buffer.alloc(sz);for(let i=0;i<sz;i++)t[i]=r8((a1+i)>>>0);if(e.t==='s'){try{R[2]=fs.writeSync(a0,t)}catch(er){R[2]=a2}return}const nn=fs.writeSync(e.h,t,0,sz,e.p);e.p+=nn;if(e.p>e.sz)e.sz=e.p;R[2]=nn;return}")
js.append("    case 2:{const p=ms(a0);let hp=p;if(p==='doom.wad'||p==='./doom.wad')hp='/app/doom.wad';try{const h=fs.openSync(hp,xf(a1),a2||0o644);const fd=NFD++;let sz=0;try{sz=fs.fstatSync(h).size}catch(er){}FD.set(fd,{t:'f',h,p:0,sz});R[2]=fd}catch(er){R[2]=-1>>>0}return}")
js.append("    case 3:{const e=FD.get(a0);if(!e){R[2]=-1>>>0;return}if(e.t==='f')try{fs.closeSync(e.h)}catch(er){}FD.delete(a0);R[2]=0;return}")
js.append("    case 8:{const e=FD.get(a0);if(!e||e.t!=='f'){R[2]=-1>>>0;return}const o=(a1<<0)>>0;let np;a2===0?np=o:a2===1?np=e.p+o:np=e.sz+o;if(np<0)R[2]=-1>>>0;else{e.p=np;R[2]=np>>>0}return}")
js.append("    case 12:{if(a0===0||a0<=HP)R[2]=HP;else{HP=a0;R[2]=a0}return}")
js.append("    case 60:EX=a0;return;case 74:R[2]=0;return;")
js.append("    case 82:{const o=ms(a0),nn=ms(a1);try{fs.renameSync(o,nn);R[2]=0}catch(e){R[2]=-1>>>0}return}")
js.append("    case 83:{const p=ms(a0);try{fs.mkdirSync(p,{recursive:true});R[2]=0}catch(e){R[2]=-1>>>0}return}")
js.append("    case 87:{const p=ms(a0);try{fs.unlinkSync(p);R[2]=0}catch(e){R[2]=-1>>>0}return}")
js.append("    case 201:{const now=Math.floor(Date.now()/1000);if(a0)w32(a0,now);R[2]=now;return}")
js.append("    default:console.error('Syscall '+n+' @0x'+(cpc>>>0).toString(16));process.exit(1)}")
js.append("}")

# JIT compiler
js.append("const BC=new Map;")
js.append("function cBlk(sp){")
js.append("  const L=[];let pc=sp,done=false;")
js.append("  function u(i){return'(R['+i+']>>>0)'}")
js.append("  function s(i){return'(R['+i+']|0)'}")
js.append("  function w(i,e){return i===0?'':'R['+i+']=('+e+')>>>0;'}")
js.append("  function br(tgt){return'npc='+tgt+';'}")

# Now the instruction compilation loop
js.append("  while(!done&&L.length<200){")
js.append("    const I=r32(pc),opc=pc;pc+=4;const op=I>>>26,rs=(I>>>21)&31,rt=(I>>>16)&31,rd=(I>>>11)&31,sh=(I>>>6)&31,fn=I&63,si=(I<<16)>>16,ui=I&0xFFFF;")

# SPECIAL (op=0)
js.append("    if(op===0){switch(fn){")
js.append("      case 0:L.push(w(rd,u(rt)+'<<'+sh));break;  //sll")
js.append("      case 2:L.push(w(rd,u(rt)+'>>>'+sh));break; //srl")
js.append("      case 3:L.push('R['+rd+']=('+s(rt)+'>>'+sh+')>>>0;');break; //sra")
js.append("      case 4:L.push(w(rd,u(rt)+'<<('+u(rs)+'&31)'));break; //sllv")
js.append("      case 6:L.push(w(rd,u(rt)+'>>>'+u(rs)+'&31)'));break; //srlv")
js.append("      case 7:L.push('R['+rd+']=('+s(rt)+'>>('+u(rs)+'&31))>>>0;');break; //srav")
js.append("      case 8:L.push(br(u(rs)));done=true;break; //jr")
js.append("      case 9:{const t=rd||31;L.push('R['+t+']='+((opc+8)>>>0)+';'+br(u(rs)));done=true;break} //jalr")
js.append("      case 10:L.push('if('+u(rt)+'===0)R['+rd+']=R['+rs+'];');break; //movz")
js.append("      case 11:L.push('if('+u(rt)+'!==0)R['+rd+']=R['+rs+'];');break; //movn")
js.append("      case 12:L.push('doSys('+(opc>>>0)+');if(EX!==null)return;');break; //syscall")
js.append("      case 15:break; //sync")
js.append("      case 16:L.push(w(rd,'hi'));break; //mfhi")
js.append("      case 17:L.push('hi='+u(rs)+';');break; //mthi")
js.append("      case 18:L.push(w(rd,'lo'));break; //mflo")
js.append("      case 19:L.push('lo='+u(rs)+';');break; //mtlo")
js.append("      case 24:L.push('{const r=BigInt('+s(rs)+')*BigInt('+s(rt)+');lo=Number(r&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;hi=Number((r>>32n)&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;}');break; //mult")
js.append("      case 25:L.push('{const r=BigInt('+u(rs)+')*BigInt('+u(rt)+');lo=Number(r&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;hi=Number((r>>32n)&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;}');break; //multu")
js.append("      case 26:L.push('{const a='+s(rs)+',b='+s(rt)+';if(b){lo=(Math.trunc(a/b))>>>0;hi=(a%b)>>>0;}}');break; //div")
js.append("      case 27:L.push('{const a='+u(rs)+',b='+u(rt)+';if(b){lo=(a/b)>>>0;hi=(a%b)>>>0;}}');break; //divu")
js.append("      case 32:case 33:L.push(w(rd,u(rs)+'+'+u(rt)));break; //add/addu")
js.append("      case 34:case 35:L.push(w(rd,u(rs)+'-'+u(rt)));break; //sub/subu")
js.append("      case 36:L.push(w(rd,u(rs)+'&'+u(rt)));break; //and")
js.append("      case 37:L.push(w(rd,u(rs)+'|'+u(rt)));break; //or")
js.append("      case 38:L.push(w(rd,u(rs)+'^'+u(rt)));break; //xor")
js.append("      case 39:L.push(w(rd,'~('+u(rs)+'|'+u(rt)+')'));break; //nor")
js.append("      case 42:L.push(w(rd,s(rs)+'<'+s(rt)+'?1:0'));break; //slt")
js.append("      case 43:L.push(w(rd,u(rs)+'<'+u(rt)+'?1:0'));break; //sltu")

js.append("      case 6:L.push('if('+s(rs)+'<=0)'+br((opc+4+(si<<2))>>>0));done=true;break; //blez")

js.append("      case 10:L.push(w(rt,s(rs)+'<('+si+')?1:0'));break; //slti")
js.append("      case 11:L.push(w(rt,u(rs)+'<('+(si>>>0)+')?1:0'));break; //sltiu")
js.append("      case 12:L.push(w(rt,u(rs)+'&'+ui));break; //andi")
js.append("      case 13:L.push(w(rt,u(rs)+'|'+ui));break; //ori")
js.append("      case 14:L.push(w(rt,u(rs)+'^'+ui));break; //xori")

js.append("      case 28:{const f2=I&63;switch(f2){")
js.append("        case 0:L.push('{const r=BigInt('+s(rs)+')*BigInt('+s(rt)+');let a=(BigInt(hi>>>0)<<32n)|BigInt(lo>>>0);a=a+r;lo=Number(a&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;hi=Number((a>>32n)&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;}');break; //madd")
js.append("        case 1:L.push('{const r=BigInt('+u(rs)+')*BigInt('+u(rt)+');let a=(BigInt(hi>>>0)<<32n)|BigInt(lo>>>0);a=a+r;lo=Number(a&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;hi=Number((a>>32n)&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;}');break; //maddu")

js.append("          else if(sh2===2)L.push(w(rd,'(('+u(rt)+'&0xFF00FF)<<8)|(('+u(rt)+'&0xFF00FF00)>>>8)')); //wsbh")

js.append("      case 32:L.push(w(rt,'((r8(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0))<<24)>>24'));break; //lb")
js.append("      case 33:L.push(w(rt,'((r16(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0))<<16)>>16'));break; //lh")

js.append("      case 41:L.push('w16(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,'+u(rt)+');');break; //sh")
js.append("      case 42:L.push('{const a=('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,al=a&~3,bo=a&3,old=r32(al),v='+u(rt)+';w32(al,bo===0?v:bo===1?(old&0xFF000000|v&0x00FFFFFF)>>>0:bo===2?(old&0xFFFF0000|v&0x0000FFFF)>>>0:(old&0xFFFFFF00|v&0x000000FF)>>>0);}');break; //swl")
js.append("      case 43:L.push('w32(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,'+u(rt)+');');break; //sw")
js.append("      case 46:L.push('{const a=('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,al=a&~3,bo=a&3,old=r32(al),v='+u(rt)+';w32(al,bo===0?(old&0x00FFFFFF|v<<24)>>>0:bo===1?(old&0x0000FFFF|v<<16)>>>0:bo===2?(old&0x000000FF|v<<8)>>>0:v);}');break; //swr")

# Close the while loop and function

js.append("  if(!done)L.push(br(pc));")

js.append("const R=new Uint32Array(32);R[29]=0x7FFF0000;")

PYSCRIPT
",

js.append("function r8(a){const p=M[a>>>16];return p?p[a&65535]:0}")

js.append("function r32(a){const o=a&65535,p=M[a>>>16];if(!p)return 0;return o<65533?(p[o]|(p[o+1]<<8)|(p[o+2]<<16)|(p[o+3]<<24))>>>0:(r8(a)|(r8(a+1)<<8)|(r8(a+2)<<16)|(r8(a+3)<<24))>>>0}")

js.append("const FD=new Map;let NFD=3;FD.set(0,{t:'s'});FD.set(1,{t:'s'});FD.set(2,{t:'s'});")

js.append("    case 1:{const e=FD.get(a0);if(!e){R[2]=-1>>>0;return}const sz=Math.min(a2,0x100000),t=Buffer.alloc(sz);for(let i=0;i<sz;i++)t[i]=r8((a1+i)>>>0);if(e.t==='s'){try{R[2]=fs.writeSync(a0,t)}catch(er){R[2]=a2}return}const nn=fs.writeSync(e.h,t,0,sz,e.p);e.p+=nn;if(e.p>e.sz)e.sz=e.p;R[2]=nn;return}")

js.append("      case 18:L.push(w(rd,'lo'));break; //mflo")

js.append("      case 24:L.push('{const r=BigInt('+s(rs)+')*BigInt('+s(rt)+');lo=Number(r&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;hi=Number((r>>32n)&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;}');break; //mult")
js.append("      case 25:L.push('{const r=BigInt('+u(rs)+')*BigInt('+u(rt)+');lo=Number(r&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;hi=Number((r>>32n)&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;}');break; //multu")

js.append("        case 1:L.push('{const r=BigInt('+u(rs)+')*BigInt('+u(rt)+');let a=(BigInt(hi>>>0)<<32n)|BigInt(lo>>>0);a=a+r;lo=Number(a&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;hi=Number((a>>32n)&0xFFFFFFFFn)>>>0;}');break; //maddu")
js.append("        case 2:L.push(w(rd,'Math.imul('+u(rs)+','+u(rt)+')'));break; //mul")
js.append("        case 32:L.push(w(rd,u(rs)+'===0?32:Math.clz32('+u(rs)+')'));break; //clz")
js.append("        case 33:L.push(w(rd,'~'+u(rs)+'===0?32:Math.clz32(~('+u(rs)+')>>>0)'));break; //clo")
js.append("        default:return null}break}")
js.append("      case 31:{const f3=I&63,sh2=(I>>>6)&31;switch(f3){")
js.append("        case 0:L.push(w(rt,'('+u(rs)+'>>>'+sh2+')&'+((1<<(rd+1))-1)));break; //ext")
js.append("        case 4:{const m2=((1<<(rd+1-sh2))-1)<<sh2;L.push('R['+rt+']=(R['+rt+']&'+((~m2)>>>0)+'|('+u(rs)+'<<'+sh2+'&'+(m2>>>0)+'))>>>0;');break} //ins")
js.append("        case 32:{if(sh2===0){L.push('{let v='+u(rt)+',r=0;for(let i=0;i<4;i++){let b=(v>>>(i*8))&0xff;b=((b&1)<<7)|((b&2)<<5)|((b&4)<<3)|((b&8)<<1)|((b&16)>>1)|((b&32)>>3)|((b&64)>>5)|((b&128)>>7);r|=(b<<(i*8))}R['+rd+']=r>>>0;}');}")
js.append("          else if(sh2===2)L.push(w(rd,'(('+u(rt)+'&0xFF00FF)<<8)|(('+u(rt)+'&0xFF00FF00)>>>8)')); //wsbh")
js.append("          else if(sh2===16)L.push('R['+rd+']=((('+u(rt)+')<<24)>>24)>>>0;'); //seb")
js.append("          else if(sh2===24)L.push('R['+rd+']=((('+u(rt)+')<<16)>>16)>>>0;'); //seh")
js.append("          else return null;break}")
js.append("        case 59:L.push('R['+rt+']=0;');break; //rdhwr")
js.append("        default:return null}break}")
js.append("      case 32:L.push(w(rt,'((r8(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0))<<24)>>24'));break; //lb")
js.append("      case 33:L.push(w(rt,'((r16(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0))<<16)>>16'));break; //lh")
js.append("      case 34:L.push('{const a=('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,al=a&~3,bo=a&3,mv=r32(al);R['+rt+']=(bo===0?mv:bo===1?(R['+rt+']&0xFF000000|mv>>>8)>>>0:bo===2?(R['+rt+']&0xFFFF0000|mv>>>16)>>>0:(R['+rt+']&0xFFFFFF00|mv>>>24)>>>0)>>>0;}');break; //lwl")
js.append("      case 35:L.push(w(rt,'r32(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0)'));break; //lw")
js.append("      case 36:L.push(w(rt,'r8(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0)'));break; //lbu")
js.append("      case 37:L.push(w(rt,'r16(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0)'));break; //lhu")
js.append("      case 38:L.push('{const a=('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,al=a&~3,bo=a&3,mv=r32(al);R['+rt+']=(bo===0?(R['+rt+']&0x00FFFFFF|mv<<24)>>>0:bo===1?(R['+rt+']&0x0000FFFF|mv<<16)>>>0:bo===2?(R['+rt+']&0x000000FF|mv<<8)>>>0:mv)>>>0;}');break; //lwr")
js.append("      case 40:L.push('w8(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,'+u(rt)+');');break; //sb")
js.append("      case 41:L.push('w16(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,'+u(rt)+');');break; //sh")
js.append("      case 42:L.push('{const a=('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,al=a&~3,bo=a&3,old=r32(al),v='+u(rt)+';w32(al,bo===0?v:bo===1?(old&0xFF000000|v&0x00FFFFFF)>>>0:bo===2?(old&0xFFFF0000|v&0x0000FFFF)>>>0:(old&0xFFFFFF00|v&0x000000FF)>>>0);}');break; //swl")
js.append("      case 43:L.push('w32(('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,'+u(rt)+');');break; //sw")
js.append("      case 46:L.push('{const a=('+u(rs)+'+('+si+'))>>>0,al=a&~3,bo=a&3,old=r32(al),v='+u(rt)+';w32(al,bo===0?(old&0x00FFFFFF|v<<24)>>>0:bo===1?(old&0x0000FFFF|v<<16)>>>0:bo===2?(old&0x000000FF|v<<8)>>>0:v);}');break; //swr")
js.append("      case 48:case 49:case 50:case 51:case 52:case 53:case 54:case 55:case 56:case 57:case 58:case 59:case 60:case 61:case 62:case 63:break; //FPU")

js.append("    }")

# Close the while loop and function
js.append("  }")
js.append("  if(!done)L.push(br(pc));")

js.append("  try{return{fn:new Function('R','r8','w8','r16','w16','r32','w32','hi','lo','doSys','EX',L.join('\n')),endPC:pc}}catch(e){console.error('CE @0x'+sp.toString(16)+': '+e.message);return null}")
js.append("}")

# Run loop
js.append("const R=new Uint32Array(32);R[29]=0x7FFF0000;")

js.append("console.error('Exit:'+EX+' '+ic+' blocks in '+((Date.now()-t0)/1000).toFixed(1)+'s');")

with open('/app/vm.js','w') as f:
